project.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Course Business HQ
project.description: Central workspace for Vibe Coders Academy — course business planning, research, automations, and launch ops.

automations.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Morning standup prep
automations.body:
You are the PM Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🎯 *PM Agent* |

1. Read data/hq.db — collections: standups (last 7 days), tasks.
2. Read recent git commits if repo is available.
3. Upsert standups entry for YYYY-MM-DD with list_items sections: done, today (max 3), blockers, agent_next.
4. Update tasks collection if priorities changed; do not delete completed items without evidence.
5. Run: python3 scripts/build_site.py
6. If Send to Slack is enabled, post a ≤15 line summary to #vibe-standup.

Rules:
- Never invent completed work.
- Ask Denis explicit questions for blockers.
- Follow .cursor/rules/pm-assistant.mdc conventions.

settings.name: Vibe Coders Academy — Morning standup prep
settings.tools: Memories, Read Slack (optional), Send to Slack (optional)

listItems.text: Automation created and saved
First run checked — file exists under planning/standups/
Reply in thread with today's #1 priority

automations.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Competitor research
automations.body:
You are the Research Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 🔍 *Research Agent* |

## On Slack trigger (competitor: NAME or research: NAME)
1. Parse the competitor name from the message.
2. Read research/competitors watchlist table in data/hq.db.
3. Research using web search / Exa MCP. Cite URLs with dates.
4. Insert child entry under research/competitors with report body.
5. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
6. Reply in thread with: 3-bullet summary + entry slug.

## On weekly schedule
1. Read watchlist priority column from hq.db.
2. For each high-priority competitor not covered in 7 days, append to a weekly report entry.
3. End with Strategic recommendations (max 3 bullets).

Rules:
- Do not invent pricing or features. Mark unknowns explicitly.
- Follow .cursor/rules/competitor-research.mdc.

settings.name: Vibe Coders Academy — Competitor research
settings.tools: Memories, MCP Exa (if connected), web search

listItems.text: Fill research/competitors/COMPETITORS.md
Test: post competitor: {name} in #vibe-research
Verify markdown file committed or agent reports path

automations.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Business plan
automations.body:
You are the Business Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 📊 *Business Agent* |

## On Slack trigger
If message contains "update" or "draft":
- Read business/plan and business/messaging entries in data/hq.db, plus tasks and research.
- Update business collection entries (preserve Denis manual edits; note changes in reply).
- Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
- Reply with: what changed + open questions for Denis.

If message contains "review" or "reality":
- Compare tasks + last 30 days standups to business/plan roadmap section.
- Add variance note as new entry in business collection.

Rules:
- State assumptions for market size numbers.
- No pricing/launch claims unless in messaging entry.
- Follow .cursor/rules/brand-voice.mdc.

listItems.text: Fill executive summary + ICP in business/plan-v1.md
Test: plan update positioning in #vibe-business

automations.title: Vibe Coders Academy — Social drafts
automations.body:
You are the Social Agent for Vibe Coders Academy. Prefix Slack output with: 📣 *Social Agent* |

1. Read business/messaging and business/plan entries in data/hq.db.
2. Create 3 draft entries in social collection with props.approved=false.
3. Run python3 scripts/build_site.py
4. Reply in #vibe-social with previews and: "Reply approve 1,2,3 or edit in DB."

Publish automation (separate): only Buffer MCP when props.approved=true.

Rules:
- Follow .cursor/rules/social-guardrails.mdc strictly.
- NEVER publish in this automation.

settings.name: Vibe Coders Academy — Social drafts
settings.tools: Memories — do NOT enable Buffer on this automation

listItems.text: Test: draft: 2 linkedin posts about learning Cursor automations
Review files in content/social/
Set approved: true before enabling publish automation

business.title: Business plan v1
business.status: Draft outline — Denis to fill positioning
business.body:
# Business plan v1 — Vibe Coders Academy

**Status:** Draft outline — Denis to fill positioning  
**Last updated:** 2026-05-27
**Planned domain:** `vibe-coders.academy` — not active yet

## 1. Executive summary

_TBD — 3–5 sentences after positioning call._

## 2. Problem & ICP

- **Problem:**
- **Ideal student:**
- **Not for:**

## 3. Solution & curriculum

- **Promise:** Ship with AI agents (Cursor-first), not theory-only.
- **Modules (draft):**
  1. Cursor IDE + agent workflow
  2. Rules, skills, project structure
  3. MCP integrations (Notion, Slack, Buffer, etc.)
  4. Cursor Automations for PM, research, content
  5. Landing page + waitlist + launch

## 4. Market

- **TAM / SAM / SOM:** _TBD with assumptions stated_
- **Trends:** AI-native dev education, agentic coding

## 5. Competition

See `research/competitors/COMPETITORS.md` and weekly reports in `research/competitors/`.

Current direct competitor signal: SoftUni already markets Bulgarian AI-first programming, vibe coding, AI-assisted development, and agentic workflow courses. See `research/competitors/2026-05-27-bulgaria-ai-coding-market.md`.

## 6. Go-to-market

| Channel | Role | Status |
|---------|------|--------|
| LinkedIn | Authority + waitlist | planned |
| X | Short insights | planned |
| Slack (internal) | PM + agent ops | implementing |
| Landing page | Conversion | backlog |

## 7. Revenue model

- _TBD:_ cohort / self-paced / hybrid / community
- **Price hypothesis:** _TBD_
- **Costs:** Cursor usage, MCP tools, ads (later)

## 8. 90-day roadmap

| Week | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 1–2 | Positioning, competitor scan, Slack + automations live |
| 3–4 | Curriculum outline v1, approved messaging, first social drafts |
| 5–8 | Landing page, waitlist, pilot module |
| 9–12 | Beta cohort or self-paced launch |

## 9. Risks & mitigations

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| Scope creep | One repo, max 3 daily priorities |
| Unverified competitor data | Citation rules in competitor-research rule |
| Social misfire | `approved: false` default + approved-messaging.md |

business.title: Approved messaging
business.body:
# Approved messaging

Only claims listed here may appear in social posts, landing copy, or automations.

## Course (fill in with Denis)

- **Working title:** Vibe Coders Academy
- **One-liner:** _TBD_
- **Who it's for:** Developers using Cursor to ship real projects
- **Planned domain:** `vibe-coders.academy` — not active yet

## Pricing & launch

| Item | Approved text | Status |
|------|---------------|--------|
| Price | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Launch date | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Waitlist URL | _Not approved yet_ | draft |
| Public domain | `vibe-coders.academy` — not active yet | draft |

## Claims we allow

- Teaching Cursor, MCP, and automations for real workflows
- Solo-founder / practitioner perspective

## Claims we do NOT allow (until approved)

- Income guarantees
- Job placement
- "Best" or "#1" without source

jobs.title: Product Owner
jobs.status: Draft in repo (2026-05-27) — Denis to confirm apply method and publish channels.
jobs.body:
# Product Owner / Operations — job description

**Status:** Draft in repo (2026-05-27) — Denis to confirm apply method and publish channels.

## Denis checklist

- [x] Paste full JD below
- [ ] Apply method: email / form URL / LinkedIn Easy Apply
- [ ] Location: Plovdiv / remote / hybrid
- [ ] Approve for website + social announcement

---

## Position text (BG)

В началото всичко ще е доста динамично и различно всеки ден. Търсим човек, който може да помага с организацията, координацията и просто да движи нещата напред.

Някои от задачите може да включват:

- Организация на ежедневни задачи
- Project management и координация
- Research и business analysis
- Social media и online presence
- Административни задачи
- Офис организация и логистика при нужда
- Комуникация с хора, които се интересуват от курсовете

Базови умения по web design / web development са плюс, но не са задължителни.

Курсовете ще бъдат водени от AI специалист с много години опит в software engineering, enterprise проекти, software architecture и leadership. Има реална възможност да се учиш директно от този опит и да участваш в изграждането на нещо от самото начало.

Не е нужно да можеш всичко. По-важни са:

- Организираност
- Самостоятелност
- Инициатива
- Желание за развитие

И за да сме напълно честни — понякога ще има и по-досадни или рутинни задачи. Това е част от процеса, когато се изгражда нещо от нулата.

Но за правилния човек има много добра възможност за развитие, учене, повече ownership и дългосрочно участие в проекта.

---

## Publish log

| Channel | Date | Link |
|---------|------|------|
| Website careers | | |
| LinkedIn | | |
| Other | | |

names.title: Course name options
names.body:
# Course name decision

Denis selected **Vibe Coders Academy**. Apply this name across docs and customer-facing drafts.

**Planned public domain:** `vibe-coders.academy` — not active yet.

## Decision

- **Chosen name:** Vibe Coders Academy
- **Domain:** `vibe-coders.academy` — not active yet
- **Decision date:** 2026-05-27

## Shortlist (recommended to review first)

| Name | Vibe | Notes |
|------|------|--------|
| **Vibe Coders Academy** | ✓✓✓ | Chosen name; academy-shaped and clear for a course business |
| Former working name | ✓✓ | Replaced by Vibe Coders Academy; too course-instance-specific |
| **Vibe Ship** | ✓✓ | Action-oriented; “ship with AI agents” |
| **Vibe Builder Lab** | ✓✓ | Hands-on; good for cohort/workshop brand |
| **Vibe to Production** | ✓✓ | Outcome-clear; slightly longer |
| **The Vibe Cohort** | ✓✓ | Community/cohort feel; less “tool tutorial” |

## More options

| Name | Tagline idea (draft) |
|------|----------------------|
| Vibe Stack | Cursor, MCP, and automations — the modern dev stack |
| Vibe Dev Studio | Build real projects with agents in the room |
| Code the Vibe | Learn the workflow, not just the hype |
| Vibe Engineers | For developers who ship with AI, not slides |
| Ship the Vibe | From idea to deployed — practitioner-first |
| Vibe Automate | Emphasizes Cursor Automations (narrower niche) |
| Vibe Cursor Academy | Very explicit; strong SEO for “Cursor course” |
| Vibe Ops | PM + agents + Slack ops angle (might confuse with DevOps) |

## Naming criteria (for Denis)

- [ ] Works in Bulgarian market pronunciation? (say aloud: “Vibe …”)
- [ ] `.com` / social handle available? (check before final)
- [ ] Fits both **course** and **future PO hire** employer brand?
- [ ] Not confused with unrelated “Vibe” products (music app, etc.)?

listItems.text: Works in Bulgarian market pronunciation? (say aloud: “Vibe …”)
.com / social handle available? (check before final)
Fits both course and future PO hire employer brand?
Not confused with unrelated “Vibe” products (music app, etc.)?

research.title: Competitor watchlist
research.body:
# Competitor watchlist

Add competitors Denis wants tracked. Automations and agents read this list.

| Name | URL | Notes | Priority |
|------|-----|-------|----------|
| SoftUni AI / SoftUni | https://ai.softuni.bg/ | Direct competitor: AI-first programming, vibe coding, AI-assisted development, AI agents/workflows; largest local education brand. | high |
| SoftUni Vibe Coding Fundamentals | https://softuni.bg/modules/155/vibe-coding-fundamentals-january-2026/1615 | Direct offer for beginners and operators building web apps with AI, TypeScript/React/Tailwind/Supabase/Netlify. | high |
| SoftUni AI-Assisted Development | https://ai.softuni.bg/trainings/189/ai-assisted-development-january-2026 | Direct developer offer covering Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Augment Code, validation workflows, PRs. | high |
| SoftUni AI Agents and Workflows for Developers | https://softuni.bg/trainings/5350/ai-agents-and-worfklows-for-developers-august-2026 | Direct agentic coding/workflows offer covering n8n, LangChain, LangGraph, HITL, observability. | high |
| Telerik Academy — GenAI for Developers | https://www.telerikacademy.com/sprint/genai-for-developers | Adjacent pro-developer GenAI course; strong brand, certificate, business case positioning. | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — GitHub Copilot | https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training | Corporate/onsite AI coding training; Copilot course catalog and scheduled Bulgaria sessions. | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — Cursor workflows | https://www.nobleprog.bg/cc/cursor1 | Direct Cursor/agent workflow training for developers and engineering managers. | high |
| IT STEP Computer Academy Bulgaria | https://itstep.bg/python-programming-course | Python + AI / ML and web-development academy; longer career-transition pathway. | medium |
| Advance Academy AI | https://ai.advanceacademy.bg/ai | Bulgarian AI Basics / AI Specialist / business/content AI programs; broader beginner audience. | medium |
| Aula.bg AI / ChatGPT | https://aula.bg/kurs-chatgpt | Bulgarian online AI productivity and ChatGPT courses; not coding-first but competes for AI upskilling budget. | medium |
| New Horizons Bulgaria | https://newhorizons.bg/course-outline/course/ai-3025-work-smarter-with-ai | Corporate Microsoft Copilot / AI productivity training; adjacent B2B budget competitor. | low |

Latest market scan: `research/competitors/2026-05-27-bulgaria-ai-coding-market.md`.

## How to trigger research

- **Slack** (`#vibe-research`): `competitor: {name}` or `research: {name}`
- **Cursor chat:** "Research competitor X and save to research/competitors/"
- **Weekly automation:** scans this table (see `docs/automations/02-competitor-research.md`)

research.title: Bulgaria AI coding competitor scan
research.body:
# Bulgaria AI coding competitor scan

**Date:** 2026-05-27  
**Analyst:** Cursor agent  
**Confidence:** medium-high  
**Scope:** Bulgarian businesses and Bulgaria-localized providers for AI coding, vibe coding, agentic coding, Cursor/Copilot training, and adjacent AI upskilling.

## Summary

The Bulgarian market already has direct competition for Vibe Coders Academy. SoftUni is the clearest direct competitor: it has a dedicated SoftUni AI brand, a Vibe Coding / AI-first programming pathway, developer courses for Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, and an AI Agents and Workflows course covering n8n, LangChain, and LangGraph. NobleProg Bulgaria is the strongest corporate-training competitor for Copilot, Cursor, and agent workflows. Telerik Academy competes for professional developer upskilling with a polished GenAI for Developers sprint. IT STEP, Advance Academy, Aula.bg, and New Horizons are adjacent competitors that can absorb beginner, productivity, and corporate AI training demand.

## Offer & positioning

| Competitor | Directness | Offer & positioning | Audience | Priority |
|------------|------------|----------------------|----------|----------|
| SoftUni AI / SoftUni | Direct | Large local education brand with AI, vibe coding, AI-first programming, AI-assisted development, AI integrations, and AI agents. Positions itself as a leading AI education program in Bulgaria. | Beginners, developers, business users, career switchers | high |
| SoftUni Vibe Coding Fundamentals | Direct | 24-week module teaching web/app creation with AI prompts, TypeScript, React, Tailwind, Supabase, Netlify, Bolt, Lovable, Replit, Firebase Studio. | Entrepreneurs, managers, students, beginners, developers adding AI practices | high |
| SoftUni AI-Assisted Development | Direct | 5-week developer course on Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Augment Code, prompt patterns, testing, docs, refactoring, and PR workflows. | Junior to senior developers, QA/DevOps/Data specialists | high |
| SoftUni AI Agents and Workflows for Developers | Direct | 6-week agentic workflow course with n8n, LangChain Agents & Tools, memory, HITL, LangGraph, reliability, observability, and cost tracking. | Software engineers, tech leads, product/platform teams | high |
| Telerik Academy — GenAI for Developers | Adjacent/direct | Self-paced practical LLM course for software engineering: prompting, GitHub Copilot, code quality, refactoring, unit tests, JavaScript/React examples, SiteGround business case. | Developers, team leads, experienced coders, tech upskillers | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — GitHub Copilot | Direct B2B | Instructor-led online/onsite Copilot training in Bulgaria, including intro, intermediate, advanced, debugging, code review, front-end, Python, DevOps, team collaboration, and advanced agent mode. | Developers and engineering teams; corporate buyers | high |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — Cursor workflows | Direct B2B | Instructor-led Cursor training for Composer, agent mode, multi-file edits, repo-aware context, team workspaces, rules, CI, PRs, debugging, and security. | Developers, engineering managers, freelancers | high |
| IT STEP Computer Academy Bulgaria | Adjacent | 6-month Python Advanced course with Python & AI / ML and Python web development, career-transition positioning, professional certificate/diploma. | Beginners 15+, career switchers, aspiring Python developers | medium |
| Advance Academy AI | Adjacent | AI Basics, AI Specialist, AI for business/content/social/visual content; practical Bulgarian beginner AI upskilling. | Beginners, business/content users, digital upskillers | medium |
| Aula.bg AI / ChatGPT | Adjacent | Online Bulgarian ChatGPT / AI productivity courses with licensed-center certificate and subscription model; not coding-first. | Office specialists, managers, freelancers, non-technical professionals | medium |
| New Horizons Bulgaria | Adjacent B2B | Microsoft Copilot / AI productivity training and global AI/ML catalog localized for Bulgaria. | Corporate teams, Microsoft ecosystem users | low |

## Pricing

| Competitor / product | Price | Billing / duration | Source URL | Checked |
|----------------------|-------|--------------------|------------|---------|
| SoftUni Vibe Coding Fundamentals | 1017.03 лв. / 520.00 EUR reduced; 1136.15 лв. / 580.90 EUR listed full price | 24 weeks; 4-course module; installment option 2 x 275 EUR | https://softuni.bg/modules/155/vibe-coding-fundamentals-january-2026/1615 | 2026-05-27 |
| SoftUni AI-Assisted Development | 220.00 лв. / 112.48 EUR | 5 weeks | https://ai.softuni.bg/trainings/189/ai-assisted-development-january-2026 | 2026-05-27 |
| SoftUni AI Agents and Workflows for Developers | 224.92 лв. / 115.00 EUR | 6 weeks | https://softuni.bg/trainings/5350/ai-agents-and-worfklows-for-developers-august-2026 | 2026-05-27 |
| Telerik Academy — GenAI for Developers | 199 BGN / 101.75 EUR incl. VAT | Self-paced; 13 hours | https://www.telerikacademy.com/sprint/genai-for-developers | 2026-05-27 |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — Introduction to GitHub Copilot | 270 EUR online; 1120 EUR classroom | 7 hours | https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training | 2026-05-27 |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — GitHub Copilot advanced/team/front-end courses | 540 EUR online; 940 EUR classroom typical listed sessions | 14 hours | https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training | 2026-05-27 |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — GitHub Copilot: Advanced Agent Mode | 810 EUR online; 1410 EUR classroom | 21 hours | https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training | 2026-05-27 |
| NobleProg Bulgaria — Cursor workflows | 540 EUR online; 940 EUR classroom typical listed sessions; some Plovdiv classroom listings at 2240 EUR | 14 hours | https://www.nobleprog.bg/cc/cursor1 | 2026-05-27 |
| IT STEP Python / Artificial Intelligence | From 255 лв./month | 6 months; 2 sessions/week | https://itstep.bg/python-programming-course | 2026-05-27 |
| Advance Academy AI Basics / AI Specialist | Unknown — needs manual check | 2 weeks to 2 months depending on program | https://ai.advanceacademy.bg/ai | 2026-05-27 |
| Aula.bg — Тайните на ChatGPT | 299 лв. / 152.88 EUR single course; 289 лв. / 147.76 EUR discounted subscription; 599 лв. / 306.26 EUR PRO subscription | 8-week course; 6 months access for single course | https://aula.bg/kurs-chatgpt | 2026-05-27 |
| New Horizons Bulgaria — AI-3025 Work smarter with AI | 100 EUR | 1 day / 8 hours | https://newhorizons.bg/course-outline/course/ai-3025-work-smarter-with-ai | 2026-05-27 |

## Format

| Competitor | Delivery | Community / support | Certificate |
|------------|----------|---------------------|-------------|
| SoftUni AI / SoftUni | Online live + recordings; exams/projects | Closed course group, mentor help, lifetime lecture/resource access | SoftUni certificate; some modules mention professional training certificate |
| Telerik Academy | Online self-paced Sprint | Practical projects, frameworks/guides, business case; admission may close between cohorts | Telerik Academy certificate |
| NobleProg Bulgaria | Instructor-led online live or onsite in Bulgaria; public or tailored corporate sessions | Hands-on labs in real IDE/version-control environments; tailored to team stack | Training completion certificate implied by provider |
| IT STEP | Online and academy-based options | Partner-company positioning; practical tasks | Professional qualification certificate and international diploma |
| Advance Academy | Live online programs and shorter seminars | Practical examples and beginner-focused paths | Unknown — needs manual check |
| Aula.bg | Async online lessons, forum/Q&A, 24/7 access | Forum and course community; licensed training center | Certificate/credential from licensed center |
| New Horizons Bulgaria | Corporate course format | Standard course outline; schedule/details via provider | Unknown — needs manual check |

## Strengths vs Vibe Coders Academy

- **SoftUni has breadth, brand, and SEO ownership.** It already covers the exact terms Vibe Coders Academy wants: AI-first programming, vibe coding, Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code, AI agents, n8n, LangChain, LangGraph, and production workflows.
- **SoftUni and Telerik have recognizable certificates.** This matters for students who value credential signaling.
- **NobleProg can sell to companies.** Its online/onsite format, tailored exercises, and Bulgaria locations make it credible for B2B training budgets.
- **Pricing anchors are already visible.** SoftUni's direct developer courses are low-cost per module, while NobleProg anchors premium corporate pricing.
- **Adjacent players capture non-developer AI demand.** Aula.bg and Advance Academy may own the beginner/productivity audience before those users consider coding.

## Gaps we can exploit

- **Cursor-first, project-first specialization.** SoftUni teaches many tools; Vibe Coders Academy can be narrower and deeper around Cursor Cloud Agents, rules, MCP, repo workflows, PRs, and production habits.
- **Senior practitioner / architecture angle.** Position around real engineering leadership, software architecture, enterprise delivery, testing, review, and operational discipline rather than generic AI productivity.
- **Small-cohort ownership and feedback.** Compete against large-scale platforms with hands-on review, direct feedback, and shipped artifacts.
- **Agentic business operations.** Blend coding agents with PM, Slack, automations, research, and launch operations; most competitors separate coding from operating a business/project with agents.
- **Bulgarian founder/operator positioning.** Build examples from local business use cases and practical constraints rather than generic demos.

## Market notes

- Searches for Bulgarian "vibe coding", "AI-assisted development", "Cursor AI", and "agentic coding" overwhelmingly returned SoftUni and NobleProg for direct developer offers.
- SoftUni AI publicly claims its SoftUni Vibe Coding program is the only Vibe Coding program for practical skills in Bulgaria; this claim should be treated as their marketing claim, not repeated as fact in our public copy without independent verification.
- I did not find a clearly branded independent Bulgarian "Cursor-first academy" competitor during this scan. The nearest direct substitutes are SoftUni's AI-Assisted Development and NobleProg's Cursor workflows course.

## Sources

- https://ai.softuni.bg/
- https://softuni.bg/modules/155/vibe-coding-fundamentals-january-2026/1615
- https://ai.softuni.bg/trainings/189/ai-assisted-development-january-2026
- https://softuni.bg/trainings/5350/ai-agents-and-worfklows-for-developers-august-2026
- https://www.telerikacademy.com/sprint/genai-for-developers
- https://www.nobleprog.bg/en/github-copilot-training
- https://www.nobleprog.bg/cc/cursor1
- https://itstep.bg/python-programming-course
- https://ai.advanceacademy.bg/ai
- https://aula.bg/kurs-chatgpt
- https://newhorizons.bg/course-outline/course/ai-3025-work-smarter-with-ai

## Strategic recommendations

1. Position Vibe Coders Academy as **Cursor-first agentic software delivery**, not generic AI or beginner "no-code vibe coding".
2. Build the first offer around **one shipped project + repo workflow + PR/test/review discipline** to differentiate from broad lecture catalogs.
3. Track SoftUni and NobleProg weekly; they are the direct competitors most likely to shape pricing, keywords, and student expectations.

**Updated:** 2026-05-27 — course name selected; `vibe-coders.academy` planned but not active yet.
